panels.description:
point size = lock_cnt
point color = dot_size

targets.rawSql:
select z.collectDate as time, z.ServerName, z.session_id, z.start_time, z.threhold as total_elapsed_time
     , z.total_elapsed_time as real_elapsed_time, x.cnt as lock_cnt
     , case when x.cnt is null then 1 
            when x.cnt > 0 and total_elapsed_time <= 5 then 10
            else x.cnt end as dot_size
     , sql_text
        -- 기준 데이터
  from (select collectDate , session_id, start_time, b.InstanceId
             , round(total_elapsed_time/1000,0) as total_elapsed_time, ServerName
             , case when round(total_elapsed_time/1000,0) >= 240 then 240 else round(total_elapsed_time/1000,0) end as threhold, sql_text
             , rank() over(partition by start_time, session_id order by collectDate desc) as rnk -- order by total_elapsed_time -> collectDate
          from TBL2_M_WhoIsActive a (nolock), META2_M_InstanceInfo b (nolock)
         where a.InstanceId = b.InstanceId
           and CollectDate between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
           and ServerName IN (${ServerName:singlequote})
           and login_name NOT IN ('NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM')
        ) z
  left outer join
         -- 락 카운트
        (select collectDate, b.InstanceId, blocking_session_id, count(distinct session_id) cnt, count(distinct session_id)*3 as dot_size
              , rank() over(partition by collectDate, b.InstanceId, blocking_session_id order by collectDate desc) as rnk -- order by total_elapsed_time -> collectDate
           from TBL2_M_WhoIsActive a (nolock), META2_M_InstanceInfo b (nolock)
          where a.InstanceId = b.InstanceId
            and CollectDate between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
            and ServerName IN (${ServerName:singlequote})
            and login_name NOT IN ('NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM')
            and blocking_session_id > 0
         group by collectDate, b.InstanceId, blocking_session_id
        ) x on z.collectDate = x.collectDate 
           and x.InstanceId = z.InstanceId 
           and z.session_id = x.blocking_session_id
           -- 락 카운트 중복 데이터 제거
           and x.rnk = 1
 where 1=1
   -- 가장 최근 세션만 보려면 주석해제
   -- 락 체크를 위한 전체 데이터를 보려면 주석, 단, 시간 흐름에 따른 중복 데이터 조회됨
   -- 주석해제 : 실시간, 주석 : 보고용
   and z.rnk = 1
   -- and 1 = case when ${DisplayClCd:singlequote} = '실시간' then z.rnk when ${DisplayClCd:singlequote} = '보고' then 1 end
   -- and session_id = 158
   -- and total_elapsed_time > 0
order by time

panels.title: MS-SQL whoisactive Visualization

targets.rawSql:
select time, ServerName, session_id, total_elapsed_time, start_time, sql_text
from (
select collectDate as time, ServerName, session_id, round(total_elapsed_time/1000,0) as total_elapsed_time, sql_text, start_time
, rank() over(partition by start_time, session_id order by total_elapsed_time desc) as rnk
from TBL2_M_WhoIsActive a, META2_M_InstanceInfo b
where a.InstanceId = b.InstanceId
and CollectDate between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
and ServerName IN (${ServerName:singlequote})
and login_name NOT IN ('NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM')
) z
where rnk = 1
and total_elapsed_time > 0
order by time desc
